title: onobrychis supina f. intermedia
intro: Onobrychis supina f. intermedia, also known as a variant of the sainfoin plant, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It contains various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal compounds that contribute to its health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions due to its high concentration of saponins and flavonoids. Onobrychis supina f. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
